title: Incorrect permissions assignment on Splunk Enterprise for Windows during new installation or upgrade
description: Incorrect permissions assignment on Splunk Enterprise for Windows during new installation or upgrade
solution:
Upgrade Splunk Enterprise to versions 10.0.2, 9.4.6, 9.3.8, 9.2.10, or higher.

Mitigations and Workarounds
Perform the following mitigation if you are not able to upgrade to a fixed Splunk Enterprise for Windows version.
From the command prompt or a PowerShell w

cves.title: Incorrect permissions assignment on Splunk Enterprise for Windows during new installation or upgrade
cves.description: In Splunk Enterprise for Windows versions below 10.0.2, 9.4.6, 9.3.8, and 9.2.10, a new installation of or an upgrade to an affected version can result in incorrect permissions assignment in the Splunk Enterprise for Windows Installation directory. This lets non-administrator users on the machine access the directory and all its contents.
